name: hulumi
description: Hardened Pulumi for the AI-agent era — baseline components, CrossGuard pack, drift classifier, Claude Code skill pack.

scripts.test:integration: HULUMI_INTEGRATION=1 pnpm --filter @hulumi/baseline test -- tests/integration/ && HULUMI_INTEGRATION=1 pnpm --filter @hulumi/drift test -- tests/integration/
scripts.release:dry: act -j attestation-dry-run --container-architecture linux/amd64 || echo 'install act for local dry-run; CI runs attestation-dry-run on every PR'
scripts.release:verify-attestations: for pkg in baseline policies drift; do gh attestation verify --repo kerberosmansour/hulumi "$(npm pack @hulumi/$pkg --pack-destination /tmp --json | jq -r '.[0].filename' | sed 's@^@/tmp/@')"; done
